title: Notice of temporary closure - intersection of Gericke Str and Louis Fourie Rd
description: LOCAL NEWS - The landside of the Gericke...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"LOCAL NEWS - The landside of the Gericke Street intersection (Shell Service Station) will be closed for construction from Monday 2 February for two weeks should the weather play along.","html":"LOCAL NEWS - The landside of the Gericke Street intersection (Shell Service Station) will be closed for construction from Monday 2 February for two weeks should the weather play along."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Details","html":"Details"},{"type":"list","items":["Dates: 2 - 14 February 2026 (weather permitting)","A temporary entrance to the Shell Service Station will be provided.","Exit from Shell will be via Rooken Smith Street only.","Please follow temporary traffic signage."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction.","html":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safer, FOR YOU."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you for your patience while construction is underway.","html":"Thank you for your patience while construction is underway."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
